mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId , TITLE AS title , WRITER_ID AS writerId , IS_SECRET AS isSecret , VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount , TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM TB_BOARD
CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
WRITER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY BOARD_ID DESC

SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId , TITLE AS title , CONTENT AS content , WRITER_ID AS writerId , IS_SECRET AS isSecret , VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount , TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate , TO_CHAR(UPD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updDate FROM TB_BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
SELECT FILE_ID AS fileId , BOARD_ID AS boardId , ORIGIN_NAME AS originName , FILE_SIZE AS fileSize FROM TB_BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY FILE_ID ASC

SELECT COMMENT_ID AS commentId , BOARD_ID AS boardId , CONTENT AS content , WRITER_ID AS writerId , TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY COMMENT_ID ASC
